title: Manang trekking lodge
prompt: A booking site for a family-run trekking lodge in Manang, Nepal — warm, credible, not a tourism cliché. Travelers should see rooms, seasonal availability, and how to reach the lodge.

direction.name: High Valley Ledger
direction.thesis: A warm, quietly authoritative lodge booking experience that pairs the material honesty of a family guestbook with the clarity of a mountain field guide.
direction.signature: A vertical route-and-season ledger ties room availability, altitude, and the journey to Manang into one continuous, useful visual language.
